==Description==
A heavy ceremonial coat reinforced with iron plating, once worn in the name of joy.
Now it carries only judgement.

Part of the 2025 Christmas Event. Legacy Content.

== Crafting ==
To craft this overlay, you need a Smithing Skill level of 60.

==== Smithing Requirements: ====
* 150 Broken Bauble
* 1 Kringlewrath Chest Plate
* 2 Kringlewrath Arm Plate
* 2 Kringlewrath Leg Plate
* 1 Kringlewrath Mantle Plate
* 20 Frozen Core Fragment
*  Requires The Iron Saint Awakens (QE#73) Completed.
Category:Cosmetic



Category:Armor
